test_qa17_detached_dom_nodes_count
Test function
test_qa17_detached_dom_nodes_count
What it checks
Count detached DOM nodes — large leaks would surface here. We use a heap-snapshot proxy: count the difference between document.querySelectorAll('*').length and a stress scenario. Soft fails (warn only) if >5000 elements remain after cleanup.
Test data
BASE_URL

80.42s

QA-17 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa17 modal open close no heap growth
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa17_modal_open_close_no_heap_growth 2026-06-13 04:22:05 15.01s
What this test was checking
Opening the login modal 10 times must not grow JS heap > budget — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Opening the login modal 10 times must not grow JS heap > budget.
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
